title: UkrCrypto2026: International Conference on Cryptographic Research
description: Conference (23-25 Sept 2026, Kyiv) organised by the State Scientific and Research Institute of Cybersecurity Technologies and Information Protection (a Derzhspetszviazku body); section list explicitly includes 'Постквантова та квантова криптографія' (Post-quantum and quantum cryptography).

title: State Scientific and Research Institute of Cybersecurity Technologies and Information Protection (homepage)
description: English homepage of the SSSCIP research institute (DerzhNDI) that runs cybersecurity research, testing and certification in Ukraine; organiser of UkrCrypto2026.

title: CSIRT of State Scientific and Research Institute of Cybersecurity Technologies and Information Protection
description: CSIRT under the SSSCIP research institute; no explicit PQC document surfaced.

title: Information technology and cyber security qualification center (DerzhNDI)
description: Qualification/certification centre of the SSSCIP research institute; certification of cybersecurity specialists. No explicit PQC document.

title: Parliamentary research document (Verkhovna Rada Research Service)
description: PDF from the Research Service of the Verkhovna Rada that repeatedly surfaced under post-quantum-cryptography native-language queries; content could not be parsed (binary) so explicit PQC reference unconfirmed.

title: Catalogue of analytical and information materials of the Research Service of the Verkhovna Rada
description: Index/catalogue page of parliamentary research materials; no quantum/PQC title confirmed on the page.

title: Order No. 54 of 30.01.2025 - Basic cyber-defence measures and methodological recommendations
description: Derzhspetszviazku order approving basic cyber-defence measures; general cyber, no explicit PQC mention found.

title: Order No. 75 of 30.01.2026 - Catalogue of cyber-defence measures
description: Derzhspetszviazku order approving a catalogue of cyber-defence measures; general cyber, no explicit PQC mention found.

title: Recommendations (cip.gov.ua attachment id=53982)
description: Derzhspetszviazku recommendations document; returned HTTP 403 and could not be verified for PQC content.

title: Draft Cybersecurity Strategy of Ukraine (2021-2025)
description: National Security and Defence Council (RNBO) draft national cybersecurity strategy; general strategy, no confirmed explicit PQC/post-quantum reference.

title: Cybersecurity Strategy of Ukraine 3.0 (announcement)
description: RNBO announcement of Cybersecurity Strategy 3.0 (cyber resilience, digital sovereignty); references emerging tech including quantum computing but no confirmed explicit PQC-migration reference.

title: Overview of the national cybersecurity system of Ukraine 2025
description: RNBO 2025 review of Ukraine's national cybersecurity system; mentions impact of AI and quantum computing on cyberspace but no confirmed explicit PQC reference.

title: SSSCIP - State Service of Special Communications (homepage)
description: Main portal of the State Service of Special Communications and Information Protection of Ukraine (Derzhspetszviazku); lead cryptographic-policy and CERT-UA host. No dedicated PQC document surfaced.
